targets.rawSql: SELECT uniqExact(call_id) AS total_calls FROM voice_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'call.started'

SELECT if(uniqExactIf(call_id, event_type IN ('call.ended','call.failed')) = 0, 0, uniqExactIf(call_id, event_type = 'call.ended') / uniqExactIf(call_id, event_type IN ('call.ended','call.failed'))) AS success_rate FROM voice_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)

SELECT $__timeInterval(event_time) AS time, stage, quantileExactIf(0.50)(latency_ms, latency_ms IS NOT NULL) AS p50_ms, quantileExactIf(0.95)(latency_ms, latency_ms IS NOT NULL) AS p95_ms FROM voice_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type IN ('stt.final_transcript','llm.first_token','tts.first_audio') GROUP BY time, stage ORDER BY time

SELECT stage, provider, model, countIf(latency_ms IS NOT NULL) AS samples, quantileExactIf(0.50)(latency_ms, latency_ms IS NOT NULL) AS p50_ms, quantileExactIf(0.95)(latency_ms, latency_ms IS NOT NULL) AS p95_ms, quantileExactIf(0.99)(latency_ms, latency_ms IS NOT NULL) AS p99_ms, countIf(event_type = 'provider.failed') AS errors FROM voice_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND stage != '' GROUP BY stage, provider, model ORDER BY samples DESC LIMIT 50

WITH starts AS (SELECT call_id, any(assistant_id) AS assistant_id, min(event_time) AS start_time FROM voice_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'call.started' GROUP BY call_id), ends AS (SELECT call_id, max(event_time) AS end_time, any(status) AS status FROM voice_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type IN ('call.ended','call.failed') GROUP BY call_id) SELECT starts.call_id, starts.assistant_id, starts.start_time, ends.end_time, ends.status, dateDiff('second', starts.start_time, ends.end_time) AS duration_seconds, countIf(e.event_type = 'user.barge_in_confirmed') AS barge_in_count, countIf(e.event_type = 'vad.noise_turn_ignored') AS noise_turn_count, countIf(e.event_type = 'pipeline.corked') AS cork_count, countIf(e.event_type = 'provider.failed') AS provider_error_count, anyIf(e.trace_id, e.trace_id != '') AS trace_id FROM starts LEFT JOIN ends USING call_id LEFT JOIN voice_events e ON e.call_id = starts.call_id GROUP BY starts.call_id, starts.assistant_id, starts.start_time, ends.end_time, ends.status ORDER BY starts.start_time DESC LIMIT 100
